title: Alerting on Loop Anomalies
concept: Setting alerts for loops that exceed step limits, token budgets, or tool failure thresholds.

exercises.prompt: What metric helps us decide if a task is too resource-intensive for an AI agent?
exercises.explain: Average steps per task helps us decide if an AI agent is taking too long on a task.

cards.title: Setting Alerts is Essential
cards.body: Alerts notify us when something goes wrong. For AI agents, this includes looping issues that might waste resources.

cards.title: What is an Alert?
cards.body: An alert is a notification that lets you know when a specific condition is met, like when a loop exceeds limits set for steps or tokens.

cards.title: Alerting is Like a Smoke Detector
cards.body: Just like a smoke detector alerts you to danger in your home, alerts in AI monitor for excessive loops or failures, ensuring quick action.

cards.title: Example of an Alerting System
cards.body: Imagine an AI that should not loop more than 10 times. If it exceeds that, an alert triggers, informing the team to check for issues.

cards.title: Myth: Alerts Are Always Bad
cards.body: Many think alerts mean failure, but they are valuable tools to prevent problems before they escalate.

cards.title: Comparing Alert Types
cards.body: Different alerts can be set based on criteria.

exercises.prompt: What is a reason to set an alert on loop anomalies?
exercises.explain: Setting alerts helps prevent performance issues by notifying us when loops exceed set limits.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Alerts should be disabled to prevent distracting notifications.
exercises.explain: Alerts are important for catching potential issues and should not be disabled.

exercises.prompt: Set an alert if the AI loops more than ___ times.
exercises.sentence: Set an alert if the AI loops more than 10 times.
exercises.explain: The correct number to set an alert is based on the condition specified, which is 10.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following would likely trigger an alert?

options.text: AI looping 8 times when the limit is 10
AI looping 15 times when the limit is 10
AI completing tasks normally under budget

exercises.explain: Looping beyond the set limit (15 vs 10) triggers an alert due to exceeded thresholds.

exercises.prompt: What would be the best approach if an AI's loop threshold is exceeded?

options.text: Set an alert to notify the team

exercises.explain: Setting an alert allows the team to take necessary actions when thresholds are exceeded, keeping the AI effective.
